label: default agent • create a cron schedule
query: Set up a schedule for agent e3a7c1d4-5b29-4f80-9a6e-1c8d2f5b3079 using the cron expression "0 9 * * 1-5", call it "Weekday Report" and have it run my status report.
notes: Second schedule frequency mode (cron) to prove the frequency enum carries more than 'daily'. action 'create', frequency 'cron'. A custom agent is seeded at the referenced id so create SUCCEEDS (correct cron mapping + a real schedule) instead of looping on a not-found agent — the agent is torn down after the case. The selection assertion pins action + cron. maxIterations is the domain default (6), not a tight 4: schedule create takes several required fields, and a model that sends a partial first call gets a consolidated missing-fields error and needs a couple of iterations to resend a complete call before its summary.
